manCTMed 0.9.1
  • Get started

  • Articles
    Simulated Data Using Parameters from Deboeck and Preacher 2015 Continuous Time Mediation - Delta Method Continuous Time Mediation - Monte Carlo Method The Ornstein–Uhlenbeck Model manCTMed: Session
  • Changelog

Summarize Results

Source: R/manCTMed-summarize.R
Summarize.Rd

Summarize Results

Usage

Summarize(n, reps = 1:1000, wd, ncores = NULL)

Arguments

n

Positive integer. Sample size.

reps

Replication numbers.

wd

Working directory for output files.

ncores

Positive integer. Number of cores to use.

See also

Other Simulation Functions: CI(), Data(), FitCtsem(), FitDynr(), Replication()

Author

Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan

Examples

n <- 50
wd <- tempdir()
delta_t <- c(5, 10)
R <- 25L
reps <- 1:2
lapply(
  X = 1:2,
  FUN = Replication,
  n = 50,
  wd = wd,
  delta_t = delta_t,
  R = R
)
